dismissalText.commentary: Sai Sudharsan c & b Hazlewood 100 (58b 11x4 5x6 76m) SR: 172.41

dismissalComment.html: And that's the end of Sudharsan's knock! Hazlewood uses pace and bounce to end a solid knock. 143kph back of length delivery hurries Sudharsan, who is late into the shot and it goes off the toe end back to Hazlewood, who takes a simple catch

dismissalText.commentary: Shubman Gill c Padikkal b Suyash Sharma 32 (24b 2x4 1x6 59m) SR: 133.33

dismissalComment.html: And there's the breakthrough! Gill was trying to take on this short-ish ball, and swings hard at it. Doesn't get it off the middle and it's a simple catch for DDP at long-on. Suyash takes a bow in celebration as the GT captain walks off

dismissalText.commentary: Jos Buttler c Hazlewood b Kumar 25 (16b 2x4 1x6 25m) SR: 156.25

dismissalComment.html: And that's gone to short third! Bhuvneshwar went for the yorker and Buttler went for the reverse-scoop. But he can't quite get under it and force the pace. No elevation at all and that's straight down Hazlewood's throat at short third. RCB pulling things back very well here
